title: Aubrevillea kerstingii

Further classification of Aubrevillea kerstingii may involve its order, class, and kingdom, but more specific information is needed for a complete classification.

The plant has been traditionally used in West African folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties.
